---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or new feature/node for this assistant
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain how this fits into the LangGraph pipelines, or if it adds a new document ingestion parser.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, designs, or flowcharts about the feature request here.
